Bluetooth chipset initialization and UART-based HCI transport for BLE communication.

## Folders
- **[chipset](chipset/README.md)**: Bluetooth chipset initialization and command handling for the CC2564 using HCI over UART.

## Files
- **[hci_uart_transport.c](hci_uart_transport.c.md)**: UART-based HCI transport implementation for BLE communication in the Nimble stack.
